title: Who built the Geo front NERV HQ
display_title: Who built the Geo front NERV HQ
wikitext:
[]: Who built the Geo-front/NERV HQ?             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Oct 09, 2007 3:46 am Hey, i'm not sure whether this is the right forum to choose, but its a little question i'm worrying about. See, who actually built the Geo-front and NERV HQ, including Terminal Dogma? And who designed? I'm just curious, but its a bit of info i'd like to be answered.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Oct 09, 2007 6:39 am The Geofront itself was built by mysterious aliens, popularly known as the "First Ancestral Race", for the purpose of housing their interplanetary colonial biomass packages during transit and landing. The role as a command fortress was applied by the humans who excavated and built a rat's nest of working spaces inside it, millions of years after it arrived.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Oct 09, 2007 6:42 am sweet lol thx a lot. i fought it was orignally the UN and Japanese government who together built of it.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:31 am Anyone else ever wonder what they're really "made" of though? We see Angels and Evas expand their AT-Fields with such a force that it destroys buildings around them and levels the ground they stand on. Why didn't any Angel simply use their ATF as a weapon to rip through the ground to get to NERV? Do you think they ever employed an Anti-ATF technology as a kind of shielding? ...Is this going to be one those Mystery Science things were I need to remind myself it's just a show?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:47 am fadingreminder wrote: Is this going to be one those Mystery Science things were I need to remind myself it's just a show?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:50 am fadingreminder wrote: Anyone else ever wonder what they're really "made" of though? We see Angels and Evas expand their AT-Fields with such a force that it destroys buildings around them and levels the ground they stand on. Why didn't any Angel simply use their ATF as a weapon to rip through the ground to get to NERV? Do you think they ever employed an Anti-ATF technology as a kind of shielding? ...Is this going to be one those Mystery Science things were I need to remind myself it's just a show?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Oct 09, 2007 12:39 pm fadingreminder wrote: Anyone else ever wonder what they're really "made" of though? We see Angels and Evas expand their AT-Fields with such a force that it destroys buildings around them and levels the ground they stand on. Why didn't any Angel simply use their ATF as a weapon to rip through the ground to get to NERV? Do you think they ever employed an Anti-ATF technology as a kind of shielding? ...Is this going to be one those Mystery Science things were I need to remind myself it's just a show?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 09, 2007 12:48 pm The primary source Episode 21 wrote: FUYUTSUKI: What is this? IKARI (OFF): A cavern left behind by someone, who was not us. Though eighty-nine percent of it is buried. FUYUTSUKI: An underground cavern that was originally a neat spherical shape... Is this the same as the underground cavern found at the South Pole?! IKARI (OFF): The data from them are virtually identical. FUYUTSUKI: Do you intend to repeat that tragedy once again?! Is that what you're doing?! IKARI: Whether we are or not, please determine that for yourself. All the resources mankind has to offer are being poured into that facility.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Tue Oct 09, 2007 1:09 pm BobBQ wrote: The Geofront itself was built by mysterious aliens, popularly known as the "First Ancestral Race", for the purpose of housing their interplanetary colonial biomass packages during transit and landing.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Oct 09, 2007 2:29 pm CitizenGeek wrote: I thought that the GeoFront had something to do with a black moon crashing into Earth (?)

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Tue Oct 09, 2007 5:14 pm BobBQ wrote: CitizenGeek wrote: I thought that the GeoFront had something to do with a black moon crashing into Earth (?)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Oct 09, 2007 5:40 pm CitizenGeek wrote: Soo .... the FAR hollowed out (for want of a better expression) this black moon for their own use, or something?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:22 pm Ornette wrote: CitizenGeek wrote: Soo .... the FAR hollowed out (for want of a better expression) this black moon for their own use, or something?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:23 pm I thought the black moon was being carried on the present Earth's moon, and it crashed into the Earth creating the present Earth-Moon system in First Impact? The usage of "Black Moon" and "White Moon" is peculiar.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Oct 09, 2007 8:32 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I thought the black moon was being carried on the present Earth's moon, and it crashed into the Earth creating the present Earth-Moon system in First Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Oct 09, 2007 9:13 pm Shin-seiki wrote: While you're at it, ever wonder what Misato's escape pod was made of that somehow saved her from being tanged (unlike every other living thing in Antarctica) during 2I?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Oct 09, 2007 9:15 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I thought the black moon was being carried on the present Earth's moon, and it crashed into the Earth creating the present Earth-Moon system in First Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:03 pm This is going a little *bit* off-topic but I don't mind. At least I have the answer to my question. 8) But watch out if the admins decide to dump this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 13, 2007 11:26 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: This is going a little *bit* off-topic but I don't mind. At least I have the answer to my question. 8) But watch out if the admins decide to dump this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Oct 13, 2007 3:56 pm Here's something that might help, Lilith was the name given to a supposed "smaller" moon that orbited the Earth closer then the actual moon, and was also "dark" in complexion as to explain why it couldn't be seen "most of the time". Obviously, when satellites and more advanced telescopes were developed to search through our own space more thoroughly, this theory was quickly thrown out, although there are some hold outs, right along side the planet "Vulcan" theory ( a translucent planet between the Sun and Mercury) and the Earth internalized-universe ( essentially, the entire universe is contained within the Earth's crust, with some spinning light in the center providing night and day, instead of the sun). In otherwords, the "black moon" name may just of been a homage to that theory, probably made a little more real in the Eva universe. 8)

See, who actually built the Geo-front and NERV HQ, including Terminal Dogma? And who designed? I'm just curious, but its a bit of info i'd like to be answered.
